prompt: /explain-codebase what changed in the last 10 commits --scope commit:HEAD~10..HEAD

assertions.text: Frontmatter scope value reflects commit:HEAD~10..HEAD or equivalent commit-range expression
Sequence section walks chronologically through the commits or changed regions
Files touched section lists files matching git diff --name-only HEAD~10..HEAD
INDEX.md updated with row showing commit-range scope
Distinguishes behavioral changes from doc/CI changes (cites at least one of each)
